description: Create a dive trip in Subsurface named 'Red Sea Liveaboard 2022' at 'Hurghada, Egypt' and record a manual dive for September 10, 2022 (08:00, 55 minutes, 28.0m max depth) with buddy 'Sara Al-Rashid' and notes 'Night dive around the wreck of the SS Thistlegorm'.
